iran_nuke.notes: Day 14 — MIXED SIGNALS. Trump contradicts own messaging: says US will hit Iran 'very hard over the next week' (Reuters) shortly after earlier saying war 'could be over soon.' Pezeshkian peace terms (rights, reparations, guarantees) still on table. Israeli security sources admit no realistic regime change plan existed — 'wishful thinking' not intelligence (Guardian). New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei wounded/disfigured. Nuclear rhetoric signal swaps: removed 'iran_president_peacetalks' (not in nuke tracker), added 'diplomacy_refused' (Iran not responding to overtures despite Pezeshkian terms). Probability stable at 9.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 14 — ESCALATION ON MULTIPLE FRONTS. NEW: Iran actively mining Strait of Hormuz (NYT: 'American officials say Iran is mining the Strait') — major naval escalation. 1,000+ cargo ships blocked from Hormuz transit. KC-135 crash updated: 6 crew dead (was 4), another KC-135 damaged but landed in Israel — 5th US aircraft lost. Fresh Iran+Hezbollah missile barrage on Israel — 2 injured, buildings damaged in north. France: 1 soldier killed, 6 wounded by drone in Irbil (first European fatality). Trump says will hit Iran 'very hard over next week' — escalatory. Netanyahu: Israel 'crushing' Iran and Hezbollah. Israel admits no regime change plan existed (de-escalatory signal). 800,000 displaced in Lebanon, 680+ killed. Oil crisis deepening: SE Asia rationing energy. IEA: 'biggest oil supply disruption in history.' Up from 61→65.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 14 — ESCALATING. Fresh Hezbollah+Iran missile barrage at Israel (2 injured, buildings hit in north). Israel strikes central Beirut + sweeping 25-mile evacuation order for south Lebanon. WaPo: 800,000 displaced, 680+ killed. CNN: 'War that never ended — Israel seizes moment to finish Hezbollah.' IDF preparing expanded operations. Katz: 'no time limit.' IDF soldiers signal removed (already counted). Ground ops intensifying. Up from 65→67.

turkey.notes: No new developments. Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace previously. NATO Article 4 discussions. Erdogan warns Iran but insists 'on side of peace.' Stable.

india.notes: No India-Pakistan military friction. Pakistan-Afghanistan war intensifying separately: Pakistan overnight airstrikes in Kabul and other areas, Taliban accuses Pakistan of targeting homes — 6+ civilians killed. China's envoy mediating. IMF-Pakistan bailout talks ongoing amid ME energy crisis. India-Pakistan tracker stable.

russia.notes: Trump eases Russian oil sanctions for 30-day waiver to offset Hormuz crisis — Russia directly benefits. Putin envoy: 'US better understands importance of Russian oil.' Russia calling for ceasefire but continuing arms supply to Iran. No direct ME military involvement. Stable.

china.notes: Chinese flights around Taiwan resumed March 13 after ~2-week pause. Trump delaying Taiwan arms sale for Trump-Xi summit (Mar 31-Apr 2). China mediating Pakistan-Afghanistan conflict. DPRK condemns US ME attacks — China notably silent on Iran war. No new escalation signals.

north_korea.notes: Kim Jong Un cruise missile tests from destroyer Choe Hyon (~10,000 sec flights). Kim emphasized 'powerful nuclear war deterrent.' Foreign Ministry condemned US-Israel attacks on Iran. SCMP: Iran-DPRK cooperation 'highly likely' to revive post-war. No new signals. Stable elevated.

russia_ukraine.notes: ISW: continued Russian offensive. Ukraine struck Russian electronics plant supplying missile components (WaPo). Ukraine hit oil depots in occupied Azovske. Russia scorched-earth attacks putting Ukraine power grid near collapse (NYT). Trump easing Russia sanctions for Hormuz crisis — complicates Ukraine pressure. Russia earned €6bn in 2 weeks from energy crisis. Stable elevated.

top_signals: Iran actively mining Strait of Hormuz — major naval escalation (NYT)
Trump: US will hit Iran 'very hard over the next week' (Reuters)
1,000+ cargo ships blocked from Strait of Hormuz transit
Israeli security sources: no realistic regime change plan existed — 'wishful thinking' (Guardian)
Fresh Iran+Hezbollah missile barrage on Israel — 2 injured, buildings damaged
KC-135 crash updated: 6 crew dead (was 4), 5th US aircraft lost in war
France confirms 1 soldier killed, 6 wounded by drone in Irbil — first European fatality
IEA: war creating 'biggest oil supply disruption in history'

new: hormuz_mining: Iran actively mining Strait of Hormuz (NYT) — MAJOR ESCALATION (iran_conventional)
trump_very_hard: Trump says US will hit Iran 'very hard over next week' — contradicts earlier 'war over soon' (iran_nuke)
israel_no_regime_plan: Israeli security sources admit no realistic regime change plan — 'wishful thinking' (iran_conventional, DE-ESCALATION)
iran_missile_israel: Fresh Iran+Hezbollah missile barrage on Israel — 2 injured (iran_conventional)
kc135_updated: KC-135 crash now confirmed 6 crew dead (was 4), 5th US aircraft lost
removed: iran_president_peacetalks: Removed from iran_nuke (not in that tracker's signals), kept on iran_conventional via other signals
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: DE-ESCALATION WATCH: Mixed and increasingly uncertain. Pezeshkian's peace terms still on table but no diplomatic follow-through yet. Israeli admission of no regime change plan suggests strategic failure — could accelerate exit or harden resolve. Trump sending contradictory signals: 'war over soon' AND 'hit Iran very hard.' Key tension: Israel says 'no time limit' while Trump signals urgency. Iran mining Hormuz is escalatory — shows Tehran fighting hard despite peace rhetoric. Leadership decapitation (new SL wounded/disfigured) creates power vacuum. Two-sided pressure exists but no breakthrough. Probability of resolution in near-term: moderate but declining as Trump escalates rhetoric.

latest_news.headline: Iran actively mining Strait of Hormuz — US officials confirm
latest_news.text: American officials say Iran is mining the Strait of Hormuz. 1,000+ cargo ships blocked from transit. IEA calls it 'biggest oil supply disruption in history.' SE Asia rationing energy.

latest_news.headline: Trump: US will hit Iran 'very hard over the next week'
latest_news.text: Trump said US will hit Iran 'very hard over the next week' — shortly after easing Russian oil sanctions for 30-day waiver. Contradicts earlier 'war could be over soon' comment.

latest_news.headline: Israeli security sources: no realistic regime change plan existed — 'wishful thinking'
latest_news.text: Multiple Israeli security sources say Israel did not have a realistic plan for regime change when it attacked Iran. Expectations of popular uprising driven by 'wishful thinking' not hard intelligence.

latest_news.headline: Fresh Iran+Hezbollah missile barrage on Israel — 2 injured, buildings damaged
latest_news.text: Fresh wave of missiles launched at Israel early Friday. Iran said it was firing missiles; Hezbollah launched simultaneous attack from southern Lebanon per Iranian state media. 2 injured, buildings damaged in north.

latest_news.headline: KC-135 crash: 6 crew confirmed dead (was 4), 5th US aircraft lost
latest_news.text: US KC-135 tanker crash in Iraq now confirmed 6 dead. Another KC-135 damaged but landed in Israel. 5th US aircraft lost since war began. CENTCOM: not hostile or friendly fire.

latest_news.headline: 1 French soldier killed, 6 wounded by drone in Irbil — first European fatality
latest_news.text: Warrant Officer Arnaud Frion killed in drone attack on Kurdish base in Irbil. Macron: attack 'unacceptable.' First European military fatality of the war.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan overnight airstrikes in Kabul — 6+ civilians killed, Taliban accuses Pakistan of targeting homes
latest_news.text: Pakistan military struck targets in Kabul and other areas overnight. Taliban government says at least 6 civilians killed, dozen injured. China's envoy mediating between the two. Third week of fighting.

latest_news.headline: IEA: war creating 'biggest oil supply disruption in history'
latest_news.text: International Energy Agency said the war was creating the biggest oil supply disruption in history. 1,000+ ships blocked from Hormuz. SE Asia implementing emergency measures. Oil prices whipsawing on Trump comments.

outlook: CRITICAL with UNCERTAINTY ON DE-ESCALATION TRAJECTORY: Day 14 — Conflicting signals intensify. Trump escalates rhetoric ('hit Iran very hard') while earlier saying 'war over soon.' Iran mining Hormuz = major military escalation despite Pezeshkian's peace terms. Israeli sources admit regime change plan never existed — strategic failure or pivot point? 5th US aircraft lost. First European soldier killed. Fresh Iran+Hezbollah missile barrage on Israel. Hormuz crisis deepening: 1,000+ ships blocked, IEA calls it historic. Israel says 'no time limit.' Key watch: Whether Trump's 'very hard' comment signals genuine escalation or negotiating posture, whether Hormuz mining triggers broader naval confrontation, whether Israeli admission of no plan accelerates US exit pressure, and Iran's next move after setting peace terms while simultaneously escalating at Hormuz.
